title: Vanilla+
description: Optimised and beautiful Minecraft vanilla experience
body:
# A Optimised Modpack with qol features and optional shaders and resourcepacks
**Whether you want to play alone or in a small group of friends. This modpack works well across both. It is Client and Server-side however, so keep in mind that your friends have to download it too.**

 This modpack contains resourcepacks and shaders to enhance your vanilla experience. Also contains mods than expand on the vanilla progression with mods like Advanced netherite that let you further upgrade your netherite armor. Also optimisation and qol mods like sodium and sit. And lastly, mods like Explosive enhancement and particular help make your game just that little bit nicer. Great variety of shaders are included from potato shaders to complementary unbound where you need a 5090 to atleast get some reasonable fps. Additionally, there is distant horizons but I would definetly recommend turning it off on old hardware.

As a notice. I will not be updating this modpack to support newer version or add new mods. This was a one time thing
